title: Project_Map
description: Project file structure map. Describes the purpose of each file or directory at varying levels of detail.

detail_policy.description: Description-detail strategy for each directory type

detailed.default: Main research code — each file lists: class/function signatures, input/output tensor shapes, and module dependencies

medium.default: Configs and docs — each file lists: purpose and key parameters

brief.default: Reproduced baselines — each subdirectory lists: paper source, reproduction status, and entry file

minimal.default: Logs and outputs — describe only directory purpose and storage rules, without listing specific files

structure.description: Project directory structure; keys are directory or file names

detail_level.description: Required for directory nodes only. Determines the description detail level for files under this directory.

description.description: Functional description of the directory or file

exports.description: [detailed] Main classes or functions exported by the file

io.description: [detailed] Input/output tensor shapes for model files

dependencies.description: [detailed] Paths to other project-internal modules that this file depends on

entry_point.description: [brief] Training/inference entry file for the baseline

children.description: Child directories or files; keys are names
